---
pagetitle: "Simon Yan — Data Scientist, Quantitative Analyst & Full-Stack Engineer"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== HERO ========== -->
::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-inner}

[Open to Opportunities]{.hero-label}

# [Simon Yan]{.hero-name}

[Building data systems and investment strategies that turn market complexity into competitive advantage.]{.hero-title}

:::: {.hero-credentials}
::: {.credential-item}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> M.P.S. Information Science · **Cornell University**]{.credential-text}
:::
::: {.credential-item}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> B.A. Geography Data Science · **University of Washington**]{.credential-text}
:::
::::

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-grid"></i> See My Work](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== STATS ========== -->
::: {.stats-strip}
::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-item}
### 2
Internships in Quantitative Finance
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 10+
Projects Delivered
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 100K+
Market Data Processed
:::

::: {.stat-item}
### 2026
Cornell Graduate
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ========== FEATURED PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-wide}

[Featured Work]{.section-label}

## Selected Projects {.section-heading}

A curated selection of projects showcasing my expertise in data science, quantitative finance, and software engineering.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
:::

### Private Equity Forecast Analysis

Spearheaded a quantitative strategy to evaluate private equity underwriting accuracy by leading a team of 7 to analyze historical performance versus projected forecasts. Designed core analysis quantifying the correlation between initial EBITDA/Sales projections and final investment success while translating complex metrics into actionable insights for stakeholders.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Quantitative Modeling]{.tag} [Predictive Analytics]{.tag} [Data Visualization]{.tag} [Leadership]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/Private-Equity-Forecast-Quantitative-Analysis){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-database-gear"></i>
:::

### Automated ETL Pipeline & Strategy Backtesting

Engineered an automated ETL pipeline using Python/Pandas to process 100K+ daily market data entries. Implemented rigorous data cleaning logic (outlier detection, handling missing values) to standardize data for real-time factor tracking and strategy backtesting.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Pandas]{.tag} [ETL]{.tag} [SQL]{.tag} [Data Engineering]{.tag}
:::

:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-house-door"></i>
:::

### RoomExchange: University Housing Platform

Architected a full-stack housing swap platform that enables students to list and locate properties to address campus accommodation shortages. Engineered modular frontend logic and integrated Leaflet and Mapbox APIs for dynamic geolocation visualization, earning 2nd Place in the UC Davis Big Bang! Business Competition.

::: {.tag-row}
[React]{.tag} [Mapbox API]{.tag} [Leaflet]{.tag} [Full-Stack]{.tag} [Product Design]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/RoomExchange){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://roomexchange.netlify.app/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::

<div class="text-center mt-3">
[View All Projects <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>](projects.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
</div>

:::
:::


<!-- ========== SKILLS SNAPSHOT ========== -->
::: {.section}
::: {.section-wide}

[Expertise]{.section-label}

## Skills & Technologies {.section-heading}

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-category}
#### Programming Languages
::: {.skill-tags}
[Python]{.skill-tag} [R]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [JavaScript]{.skill-tag} [Java]{.skill-tag} [Bash]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Machine Learning & AI
::: {.skill-tags}
[Scikit-learn]{.skill-tag} [XGBoost]{.skill-tag} [LLMs]{.skill-tag} [NLP]{.skill-tag} [Regression]{.skill-tag} [SHAP]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category}
#### Data & Quantitative Finance
::: {.skill-tags}
[Pandas]{.skill-tag} [NumPy]{.skill-tag} [ETL Pipelines]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [Multi-Factor Models]{.skill-tag} [Backtesting]{.skill-tag}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== CTA ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

## Let's Work Together {.section-heading}

I'm currently seeking opportunities in data science, quantitative analysis, and business intelligence — roles where I can apply my analytical skills and engineering experience to drive real business impact. I'd love to connect.

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sy31){.btn-outline-custom target="_blank"}
:::

:::
:::
